name: clickhouse-duckdb
description: Query ClickHouse tables and ingest into DuckDB

sql.title: SQL
sql.description: SQL query to run against ClickHouse

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/developers/build/connectors/olap/clickhouse
type: model
[[ if .connector_name -]]
connector: "[[ .connector_name ]]"
[[ end -]]
materialize: true
[[ if .sql -]]
sql: |
  [[ .sql | indent 2 ]]

dev:
  sql: |
    [[ .sql ]] limit 10000
[[ end -]]
